title: Ainiv 14 PCS Light up Wand Glow Sticks, 3 Lighting Modes LED Party Glow Sticks with Lanyard, Light up Flashing Wands Halloween, Christmas, Concerts, Wedding, Birthday, Party Favours
features: Package List: The package contains 14 acrylic bubble glow sticks, the handles have 4 colors (pink, yellow, blue, green), sufficient quantity, multiple colors can meet your decoration or daily use needs, shake in the dark and emit bright and shining light effects.

3 Flashing Modes: Our LED glow sticks have 3 flashing modes: fast flashing, slow flashing and constant light. Simply press the power button of the glow bubble stick to switch between 3 different light modes. Simple operation, different light flashing modes bring you different light experiences.

Lightweight & Portable: Each bubble light up wand is about 25.5cm/10inch long, lightweight and comfortable to hold. Long-term use will not make your hands tired or increase the burden on your body. Perfect for you and your family and friends to attend concerts, parties or events. Carry it when celebrating festivals to add fun and atmosphere to you.

High-quality Materials: This bubble glow light stick is made of high-quality acrylic and plastic, safe and durable, lightweight, easy to carry, not easy to break and deform, and stable light. The glow stick with lanyard design is easy to store, you can take the glow stick to anywhere.

Wide Application: The glowing flash stick is much cooler than ordinary lights, you can hold it and swing your body to the music. Suitable for wedding parties, concerts, sports events, birthday parties, Halloween, Christmas, performances and festivals, etc., to create a joyful and romantic atmosphere.
description: Ainiv 14 PCS LED Bubble Glow Sticks ✔ 3 Flashing modes: fast flashing, slow flashing and constant light. ✔With strap: There is a strap lanyard at the end of the handle for easy hanging on your hand to prevent loss. ✔Application: Suitable for concerts, sports events, birthday parties, Halloween, clubs, performances, Christmas, carnival or any other activities to increase the fun. Specifications: Color: Handle color: pink, yellow, blue, green Material: acrylic, plastic Light source: LED Power by: Built-in 3 x button batteries Size: About 25.5cm/10inch WHAT WILL YOU GET？ 14 x glow bubble sticks Notice: 1. Only suitable for adult or teenagers over 14 years of age. 2. Please allow 0.5-2 cm differences due to manual measurement. 3. Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. If you have any questions, please contact us in time. We will get back to you with an satisfying reply as soon as possible.🌹
